scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others --names frontend,backend --prefix-colors blue,green "npm --prefix frontend run dev" "cd backend && .venv/bin/uvicorn app.main:app --reload --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8000"
scripts.check:frontend: npm --prefix frontend run lint && npm --prefix frontend run build
scripts.release:check: npm run check:backend && npm run check:frontend
